title: Tab management (list/switch/detach handling)
description: Implement tab management in the extension: list-tabs returns chrome.tabs.query results, switch-tab detaches debugger from current tab and attaches to new one, chrome.debugger.onDetach handler notifies daemon and updates badge. All tab messages go through the encrypted channel.
acceptanceCriteria: list-tabs command returns array of { id, title, url } from chrome.tabs.query
switch-tab detaches from current target, attaches to new target with protocol version 1.3
chrome.debugger.onDetach handler fires when user opens DevTools or closes tab
Detach notification sent to daemon (encrypted) with reason
Badge updates on detach: connected but not debugging state
Tab change events (chrome.tabs.onActivated) forwarded to daemon
CDP commands for non-attached tab return clear error
